race.comment: ARTGIRL (9) ended a run of three minor placings in town with a disappointing effort over this distance at the Kensington track last start. Was pushed along early then raced three-wide without cover so there was an excuse. Genuine filly as a rule so give her another chance. AGRAFFE ROCKET (1) has come from worse than midfield on straightening to fill minor placings at his two runs this prep, the latest over this trip at the Kensington circuit. Heading towards a maiden win although a wide gate here dampens the enthusiasm a little. CIRCUS QUEEN (13) was safely held on debut but can improve quickly with that run under her belt. ROYAL AND READY (15) as well.
